author: Rajdeep Kushwaha
name: SP8192 + Triple Loop + SDClip + QK5 + Int6/Int8 + SLOT24 + Score-First TTT
blurb: SP8192 tokenizer (8192 vocab BPE). Triple loop depth recurrence (layers 4,5 x3 passes, start 35%). Int6 GPTQ for attn/MLP, int8 for embeddings. SDClip k=12.85/20, QK-Gain 5.0. 24-step SLOT with cosine LR + warm-started logit bias. Legal Score-First TTT (3 epochs, SGD+momentum). Parallel residuals (GPT-J style) last 4 layers. Muon WD 0.085, EMA 0.997. 11L XSA-all, GQA 8h/4kv, model_dim=512.
